title: datura metel var. muricata
intro: Datura metel var. muricata, also known as the devil's trumpet or horn of heaven, is a variant of the Datura metel plant, which belongs to the nightshade family and is a perennial shrub native to parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, sedative, and anticonvulsant effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Datura metel var. muricata include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of epilepsy and other neurological disorders. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, although it is essential to note that its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential toxicity and side effects.
